tasks.name: H9: Co-occurrence Strength vs. Absorption Rate
tasks.description: Compute p_11 (parent-child co-occurrence probability) for each first-letter feature and test correlation with absorption rate. For each of 26 first-letter features, generate 100 child prompts, check if parent latent fires, compute p_11, then correlate with absorption_rate.

pilot.pass_criteria: Pearson r > 0.2 with p < 0.10 (directional signal); if r < 0.1, hypothesis is likely null

visualizations.description: Absorption rate vs. p_11 co-occurrence probability

tasks.name: H10: Random SAE Baseline Absorption
tasks.description: Construct random SAE baseline (frozen decoder weights, random encoder) and run Chanin absorption metric on same 26 first-letter features. Compare trained vs. random absorption rates to test if absorption is structural or learned.

pilot.pass_criteria: Random SAE shows non-zero absorption (>1% mean); if zero, absorption may be purely learned

visualizations.description: Trained vs. Random SAE absorption rates per feature

tasks.name: Generate Publication Figures
tasks.description: Generate all figures for the paper using existing experiment data. Includes: absorption distribution, steering scatter, precision-recall plot, EC50 scatter, inhibition graph precision curve, rate-distortion schematic.

visualizations.description: Figure 1: Absorption rate distribution across layers
Figure 2: Steering success vs. absorption rate

tasks.name: Write Full Paper
tasks.description: Write the complete paper using sequential writing mode. Sections: Abstract, Introduction, Background, Method, Experiments (H1-H6 completed, H9-H10 new), Results, Discussion, Conclusion.
